A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. session_01�defaultSession�␀␀�`␀������␀This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.�
session_03�extendedDiagnosticSession�␀����service_22_p4_max_00�␀␀�␀␀␀�`␀�����EThis diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server.
